title: Origins: Moon Gazer
description:
She fell from the moon into the Overworld. Shy and gentle, she still remembers where she came from and when night falls, she gazes up at the sky.
They call her Moon Gazer
body:
# Moon Gazer

*A port of the original [Moon Gazer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/moon-gazer) addon for the Origins Mod.*  

---

## 🌙 Abilities

### Lunar Mobility
- **Moon Walk** — You possess enhanced agility and can dash in the direction you're looking.
- **Moon Jump** — Harness lunar energy to launch yourself up to 30 blocks into the air.
- **Moon Gravity** — Channel the moon's pull to levitate at will.
- **Moon Blast** — Expend hunger to release a burst of energy that pushes nearby entities away.

### Lunar Blessings
- **The Falling Star Wish** — Under the starry night sky, you gain a boost: increased attack damage, faster movement, and higher jumps.
- **No Gravity** — You are completely immune to fall damage.
- **Falling Stars** — Your shimmering appearance charms villagers, granting you the *Hero of the Village* effect and permanent luck. Your arrows also inflict the *Glowing* effect on targets.
- **From the Moon**  
  - Your skin is slightly translucent.  
  - End rod particles gently float around you.  
  - You have permanent night vision.  
  - You can breathe underwater.  
  - However, you cannot sleep, and you mine slower while submerged.

---

## 🌑 Weaknesses

- **Scare of the Solar** — You cannot tolerate intense brightness or heat. These effects are magnified in the Nether.
- **Weak Spot** — You take double damage from arrows and explosions, and armor provides less protection than usual.

---

## 📦 About this port

This is a faithful port of the original *Moon Gazer* addon.  
The project is actively maintained and will be expanded with new features as my modding skills evolve.

*Feel free to report issues or suggest improvements!*
